kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Top-level suite setup: PASS
kw.arg: Top-level suite setup: PASS
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

suite.name: Failing Setup

kw.name: Suite Setup Fails
Log
kw.msg: Suite setup about to fail
kw.arg: Suite setup about to fail
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Fail
kw.msg: Intentional suite setup failure - children should be skipped by extract_analyzable_items
kw.arg: Intentional suite setup failure - children should be skipped by extract_analyzable_items
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
kw.status: Intentional suite setup failure - children should be skipped by extract_analyzable_items
Intentional suite setup failure - children should be skipped by extract_analyzable_items

suite.name: Test Skipped

test.name: Test Never Reached Due To Suite Setup Failure
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Intentional suite setup failure - children should be skipped by extract_analyzable_items

test.name: Another Test Never Reached
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Intentional suite setup failure - children should be skipped by extract_analyzable_items

suite.status: Parent suite setup failed: Intentional suite setup failure - children should be skipped by extract_analyzable_items

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Suite teardown runs even after setup failure
kw.arg: Suite teardown runs even after setup failure
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

suite.status: Suite setup failed: Intentional suite setup failure - children should be skipped by extract_analyzable_items

suite.name: Failing Teardown

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Suite setup: PASS - tests will run
kw.arg: Suite setup: PASS - tests will run
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.name: Test Runs But Suite Teardown Will Fail

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Suite setup passed so this test runs normally
kw.arg: Suite setup passed so this test runs normally
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.name: Another Test That Runs Despite Teardown Failure

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Suite teardown failure does not prevent test execution
kw.arg: Suite teardown failure does not prevent test execution
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Fail
kw.msg: Intentional test failure alongside failing suite teardown
kw.arg: Intentional test failure alongside failing suite teardown
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
kw.status: Intentional test failure alongside failing suite teardown

test.status: Intentional test failure alongside failing suite teardown

kw.name: Suite Teardown Fails
Log
kw.msg: Suite teardown about to fail
kw.arg: Suite teardown about to fail
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Fail
kw.msg: Intentional suite teardown failure - tests already ran
kw.arg: Intentional suite teardown failure - tests already ran
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
kw.status: Intentional suite teardown failure - tests already ran
Intentional suite teardown failure - tests already ran

suite.status: Suite teardown failed: Intentional suite teardown failure - tests already ran

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Suite setup: PASS
kw.arg: Suite setup: PASS
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.msg: ${SUITE_READY} = True
kw.arg: ${SUITE_READY}
True
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Deeply nested suite setup: PASS
kw.arg: Deeply nested suite setup: PASS
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Three levels deep - setup passed at every level
kw.arg: Three levels deep - setup passed at every level
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.name: Deep Test That Fails

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Three levels deep - this test fails intentionally
kw.arg: Three levels deep - this test fails intentionally
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Fail
kw.msg: Intentional failure at deep nesting level
kw.arg: Intentional failure at deep nesting level
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
kw.status: Intentional failure at deep nesting level

test.status: Intentional failure at deep nesting level

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Deeply nested suite teardown: PASS
kw.arg: Deeply nested suite teardown: PASS
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.name: Test That Passes After Suite Setup

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Suite setup passed - this test should be individually analyzable
kw.arg: Suite setup passed - this test should be individually analyzable
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.name: Test That Fails After Suite Setup

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Suite setup passed - this test fails intentionally
kw.arg: Suite setup passed - this test fails intentionally
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Fail
kw.msg: Intentional failure to verify chunking picks up individual test
kw.arg: Intentional failure to verify chunking picks up individual test
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
kw.status: Intentional failure to verify chunking picks up individual test

test.status: Intentional failure to verify chunking picks up individual test

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Suite teardown: PASS
kw.arg: Suite teardown: PASS
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Top-level suite teardown: PASS
kw.arg: Top-level suite teardown: PASS
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
